title: Bootstrap Next.js project with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and shadcn/ui base
completion_summary: Bootstrap completed: Next.js 14 + TypeScript + Tailwind + static export. Build verified.
acceptance_criteria: create-next-app scaffold created with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, App Router, and src alias.
Required dependencies installed: lucide-react, clsx, tailwind-merge (and shadcn/ui init if used).
next.config.ts exists and is configured for static export (output: 'export', distDir: 'build', images.unoptimized: true).
tailwind.config.ts exists and scans app/**/* and components/**/*.
app/globals.css contains Tailwind directives and imports design fonts.
npm run dev starts the development server without errors.
